query:
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.address,
  pt.videoMode,
  pt.videoUrl,
  pt.status,
  pt.createdAt,
  u.email
FROM property_tours pt
JOIN users u ON pt.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'rdshop70@gmail.com'
  AND pt.videoMode = 'full-ai'
ORDER BY pt.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
